sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפחה

Transliteration: shiphchâh

Phonetic: shif-khaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. maid, maid-servant, slavegirl
    1. maid, maid-servant (as belonging to a mistress)
    2. of address, speaker, humility (figuratively)

Origin: from the same as H8207">H8207)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
